name: context-governor
description: A thin control layer around Claude Code's built-in compaction: pin + lossless-recall + retrieval + tool-hygiene, wired as a single hook-dispatch binary. Separates the three axes it touches — size (window occupancy), cost (recompute/cache), correctness (norm preservation) — and never writes its own lossy summarizer (compression is delegated to built-in compaction). Subscription-native (hooks + binary, no API key).
